title: What It Actually Looks Like for a Godly Man to Go First Without Needing to Be First
caption:
What it actually looks like for a godly man to go first without needing to be first.

The task nobody wants, the shift nobody signed up for, the hard conversation the group's been avoiding. He doesn't wait to be assigned it. He's already moving toward it, and he doesn't need his name on it afterward.

Christ washed feet and never once brought it up again. The disciples told that story. A man who needs credit for going first hasn't actually gone first. He's just performing first.

Real leadership doesn't wait for a title. He'll carry weight in a room he's not running because someone has to, and he's willing.

Ask what it'll cost him before you ask what he'll get. If the first answer doesn't matter to him, the second one never will either.

#faith #leadership #christianmen #manofgod #servantleadership #humility
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
